CFBSCORDLE
Guess the final score · one game a day
Pick your team
One game a day. Pick a team, see the opponent's score, and guess what your team scored — you get 5 chances. Share your score on the leaderboard to see where you, and your school, stack up.
Popular teams
How to play ▾

The board shows the opponent's final score. Your job: guess what your team scored in that game. You get 5 tries — after each guess you'll see higher or lower, and the range narrows.

Nail the exact score on back-to-back days — with the same team each day — to build a streak and climb the football ranks. Miss the exact score or switch teams and it resets.

Points Off
How many points your final guess was off. 0 = nailed it.
Turns
Guesses used, 1–5. Fewer is better.
